framework.name: Basis Theory — $50M Total, Leads Agentic Commerce Consortium
framework.description: $33M Series B led by Costanoa (~$50M total). PCI-compliant, processor-agnostic vault. Leads Agentic Commerce Consortium (20+ companies: Lithic, Skyfire, Rye, Crossmint, etc.). Customers include Pinterest, Melio, MoneyGram. Not agent-identity-specific but becoming the credential/vault layer.
framework.raw_quote: Basis Theory also leads the Agentic Commerce Consortium, a coalition of 20+ companies

source.title: The Agentic Commerce Landscape: Who's Building What in 2026
